title: Job Unit
description: Schema that describes a Checkbox Job unit

summary.title: Summary (Job Unit)
summary.description: Human readable description of the job

category_id.title: Category ID (Job Unit)
category_id.description: Identifier of the category this job belongs to.

plugin.title: Plugin (Job Unit)
plugin.description: Type of job. Determines how the job is run and how the outcome is determined.

certification-status.title: Certification Status (Job Unit)
certification-status.description: Certification status used to determine if the job is required for certification.

requires.title: Requires (Job Unit)
requires.description: Conditions that must be met for the job to run, using resource expressions.

depends.title: Depends (Job Unit)
depends.description: List of job ids that must pass before this job runs.

after.title: After (Job Unit)
after.description: List of job ids that must run before this job, regardless of outcome.

before.title: Before (Job Unit)
before.description: List of job ids that this job must run before.

group.title: Group (Job Unit)
group.description: The id of the group this job belongs to.

salvages.title: Salvages (Job Unit)
salvages.description: List of job ids that must have failed for this job to run.

command.title: Command (Job Unit)
command.description: Command to execute, run using the default system shell.

purpose.title: Purpose (Job Unit)
purpose.description: Used to communicate the purpose of an interactive job to the user.

steps.title: Steps (Job Unit)
steps.description: Actions the user should perform as part of an interactive job execution.

verification.title: Verification (Job Unit)
verification.description: Informs the user how to evaluate the outcome of an interactive job.

user.title: User (Job Unit)
user.description: The user to run the job as, most commonly used to run jobs as root.

environ.title: Environ (Job Unit)
environ.description: List of environment variable names to pass to the job command.

estimated_duration.title: Estimated Duration (Job Unit)
estimated_duration.description: Estimated job duration as a float in seconds or a duration string (e.g. 1h 2m 30s).

flags.title: Flags (Job Unit)
flags.description: List of flags that may influence how Checkbox runs the job.

imports.title: Imports (Job Unit)
imports.description: List of resource job imports from other namespaces.

siblings.title: Siblings (Job Unit)
siblings.description: List of job definition overrides to create copies of the current job.
